name: ai-demokit-web
description: Run the ai-demokit ports entirely in the browser (transpiled abap2UI5) and deploy to GitHub Pages.

scripts.assemble: rm -rf src abap2UI5 downport output build && mkdir src && git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/abap2UI5/abap2UI5 && cp -r abap2UI5/src/. src/ && cp src/99/02/z2ui5_cl_pop_*.clas.abap src/99/02/z2ui5_cl_pop_*.clas.xml src/02/ && ( cp src/99/z2ui5_cl_xml_view*.clas.* src/02/ 2>/dev/null || true ) && rm -rf src/99 && mkdir -p src/ai-demokit && cp -r ../src/. src/ai-demokit/
scripts.syfixes: find . -type f -name '*.abap' -exec sed -i -e 's/ RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_sy_itab_line_not_found/ ASSERT 1 = 0/g' {} +
scripts.downport: rm -rf downport && cp -r src downport && node ci/patch_diss_oref.mjs && abaplint --fix ./ci/abaplint-downport.jsonc && npm run syfixes
scripts.transpile: rm -rf output && cp srv/*.abap downport && abap_transpile ./ci/abap_transpile.json && node ci/patch_init_order.mjs
scripts.build: npm run assemble && npm run downport && npm run transpile && rm -rf src abap2UI5
scripts.all: npm run build && npm run webpack:build && npm run deploy:docs
